content.en:
Rumble!!!

Ye Tian's body began to transform, transforming from a bone transformation realm to a secondary bone transformation realm, and his strength was rapidly improving.

After a long time, Ye Tian's cultivation officially entered the second bone transformation realm.

"Cultivation is a breakthrough, and the strength is much stronger than in the past!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

With his current strength, he was already enough to crush the ordinary Fourth Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and he was also more powerful than many Boundary Breaking Geniuses of the Third Bone Transformation Realm.

"The most powerful in Xishan is the Lord of the Giant Bone, and now he shouldn't be my opponent!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course, it was impossible for him to raise the Bloodfish Lord Vest to the Second Bone Transformation Realm now, so he would have to consume a large amount of Ancient Source Crystals.

After all, the vest of the Lord of the Blood Fish is not a real body, and there is no way to replicate the vest of the Second Bone Transformation Realm, so it can only be cultivated step by step, which is a waste of resources.

Therefore, he will not improve the cultivation of the Bloodfish Lord's vest for the time being, unless he really does not lack the Ancient Source Crystals in the future, and the number is unimaginable, he will do so.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian re-copied all the other replica bodies except for the three vests, and they all turned into secondary bone transformation realms.

Dark Sea.

When the Lord of Darkness saw Ye Tian and found that Ye Tian had broken through to the Second Bone Transformation Realm, he was dumbfounded.

"Endless Lord, you have broken through to the Second Bone Transformation Realm???"

The Lord of Darkness was a little incredulous, how difficult it was to go from the first bone transformation realm to the second bone transformation realm, even if there were sufficient resources, it might take tens of thousands or even hundreds of thousands of primeval era years to complete the breakthrough!

How long has it been since the Endless Lord broke through?

How do you do that?

"I was lucky enough to find a lot of Ancient Source Crystals in the Ancient Forbidden Domain, so I broke through!"

Ye Tian said.

It's not a fool, it's a real fact.

Therefore, he is not lying.

It's just that the process of finding the primeval source crystal, he naturally won't say.

"Found a bunch of Ancient Source Crystals in the Ancient Forbidden Domain?" The Lord of Darkness didn't know what to say, he could only say that Ye Tian's luck was too good!

He had been to the Ancient Forbidden Realm before, but he hadn't even found a single Ancient Source Crystal.

Moreover, the Ancient Forbidden Domain is still so dangerous, if you want to find the Ancient Source Crystal needed for the Endless Lord to break through, that is not a small amount!

However, he could only be envious, if he was allowed to go to the Ancient Forbidden Realm to find the Ancient Source Crystal again, he would not dare to go, and he would not think that he had such luck.

"Lord of Darkness, I'm going to arrange some of my clansmen to enter the forces under the command of the Dark Sea to go through the training, there should be no problem!"

Ye Tian proposed.

"Of course you can, you can call the shots, you are the most powerful bone transformation realm in the Dark Sea at the moment, why do you need to ask my opinion!" said the Lord of Darkness.

"Lord of Darkness, the Dark Sea was established by you after all, and I only joined halfway, so naturally I have to ask for your opinion. "

Ye Tian hurriedly said.

"It's okay, you can arrange it as you like!"

The Lord of Darkness.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian arranged for a group of Terrans to enter some of the forces under the command of the Dark Sea.

As for joining the Dark Sea, those Blood Transformation Realm Terrans were still a little weaker.

Therefore, it is enough to experience the forces under the command of the Dark Sea.

Although the human race is not weak now, it only occupies the territorial sea of Wanlong and the Taixuan Sea, and its strength in other places is extremely weak, so it still needs to use the power of the dark sea to sharpen itself.

He couldn't take care of every Terran cultivator, and he didn't have that energy!

In the following days, Ye Tian arranged for the Terrans to join the forces under the command of the Dark Sea, and then he didn't care.

Anyway, he just arranged for a few Dark Sea Eight Blood Transformation Realm and Nine Blood Transformation Realm cultivators to take care of it.

......

The Primeval Forbidden Realm.

Ancient Murderous Objects have fallen one after another, and the number of Ancient Murderous Objects here is getting smaller and smaller, but the remaining Ancient Murderous Objects are extremely powerful, and they have all become the overlords of the Ancient Forbidden Domain.

"It won't be long before the Lord of the Ruins and the Lord of the Cave Void will definitely enter the Ancient Forbidden Domain, so I'll collect as many resources as I can first!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, the resources of the Ancient Forbidden Domain were also constantly being cultivated, so it was impossible for him to collect all the resources, and even if he collected them all now, new resources would emerge after a while.

However, he collected as many resources as he could, such as the Ancient Source Crystal, which was a good thing!

Ye Tian is now in the second bone transformation realm, but the primeval source crystal can still make his immeasurable bone undergo three bone transformations.

Of course, each immeasurable bone would have to consume a lot of primeval crystals if it wanted to complete the three bone transformations.

Therefore, if he wanted to impact the Third Bone Transformation Realm, the number of Ancient Source Crystals he needed was a huge number!

"As many immeasurable bones can be made to complete three bone transformations, let's complete as many as we can!"

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to collect Ancient Source Crystals in the Ancient Forbidden Domain.

Gradually, the primeval source crystals became more difficult to find.

"If you want to find enough primeval source crystals in the primeval forbidden realm, it will take a long time, and it will take a long time to wait for the primeval source crystals to be bred little by little. Ye Tian muttered.

In short, he knew that it was unrealistic for him to rely on the Ancient Forbidden Domain to quickly ascend to the Third Bone Transformation Realm.

this day.

The Lord of the Ruins and the Lord of the Cave Void entered the Ancient Forbidden Domain again, and after finding that the number of Ancient Beasts had decreased a lot, they also began to roam the Ancient Forbidden Domain.

And.

The other bone transformation realms also joined forces one by one to fight against those primeval murderous creatures.

However, many of the primeval source crystals were taken away by Ye Tian, and they could only wait for the new primeval source crystals to be born, or find the primeval source crystals that Ye Tian had missed.

Therefore, they naturally do not gain much.

But for these bone transformation realms, it would be good to have a little gain.

After all, their cultivation years were all based on the 10,000 primeval era, so they were naturally not in a hurry to break through quickly.

Each primeval epoch gets a little resource, and after hundreds of thousands of primeval epochs, they are very satisfied if they can break through to the next bone transformation realm.

Only Ye Tiancai couldn't stand such a slow way of cultivation, so he was in a hurry to find resources to break through.

The Primeval Forbidden Realm.

The Lord of the Ruins and the Lord of the Void joined forces to kill a top-notch primeval creature and distribute the resources occupied by the primeval creature to it.

After that, the two of them continued to join forces, and they gained a lot and accumulated more and more resources.

Gradually, an archean era passed.

At this time, there were very few primeval murderous creatures in the primeval forbidden realm, and a new primeval race was born.

Moreover, at this time, the suppression of the Outer Bone Transformation Realm by the Ancient Forbidden Domain had been reduced a lot.
